name: Annamalai Swami
bio: Annamalai Swami (1906–1995) was a direct disciple of Ramana Maharshi who served as the construction supervisor at Sri Ramanasramam before undertaking a life of seclusion and meditation near Arunachala. In his final years, he received visitors and shared teachings rooted in self-inquiry and abidance in the Self. His dialogues were compiled in 'Living by the Words of Bhagavan' and 'Final Talks.'
